mapper.sql: select order_id, order_no, subscriber_id, order_type, total_amount, paid_amount, pay_status, pay_time, pay_method, order_status, shipping_name, shipping_phone, shipping_address, shipping_zip_code, tracking_no, shipping_time, complete_time, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark from publisher_order
mapper.delete:
delete from publisher_order where order_id in
#{orderId}
